aIQualityPage.disclaimer: ⚠ Tiered golden set on the demo schema (bare engine) — a regression signal, not absolute real-world Text2SQL accuracy.
aIQualityPage.helpGrounded: runs the same test with RAG context; the RAG impact delta shows RAG's benefit.
aIQualityPage.helpHistory: re-checks YOUR saved/dashboard queries: does the AI still return the same answer? Stability % + real questions that drift.
aIQualityPage.helpIntro: This page checks that the app's own Text2SQL AI works correctly — not the user's question, but the AI's own correctness. It is a tool for whoever maintains/develops the app (not for the analyst — they use the “Ask” page).
aIQualityPage.helpReadNumbers: Accuracy % = how many questions passed · Easy/Medium/Hard separately (a drop on hard is normal) · Bare vs Grounded vs History side by side · per-case ✓/✗ shows which question failed.
aIQualityPage.helpReindex: rebuilds the RAG vector index from your queries + verified metrics.
aIQualityPage.helpRunEval: runs 37 benchmark questions through the AI and measures how many return a CORRECT result (bare engine). Press it after changing the model/prompt.
aIQualityPage.helpWorkflow: Make a change → Run eval (catch regressions, compare with the trend) → periodically Run history regression (catch real drift). In the background, a CI gate (build goes red if quality drops) and an alert (notification if it falls below threshold) protect automatically — you catch the AI silently degrading before a user does.
aIQualityPage.historyStabilityTooltip: AI drift on your saved/dashboard queries
aIQualityPage.perCaseLegend: ✓ = result matches · ⚑ = column name also matches
aIQualityPage.recentEvalsEmpty: No eval has been run yet.
aIQualityPage.subtitle: Text2SQL accuracy, latency, token usage and RAG grounding — the app measures its own AI.
aIQualityPage.title: AI Quality
aIQualityPage.trendEmpty: At least 2 evals are needed for a trend.

copilotWidget.greeting: Hi! I'm NexusBI's smart assistant. Ask in plain language — I'll run the query, pick the right chart, build a dashboard, and surface insights, forecasts and anomalies. Ask me something:

copilotWidget.suggestion2: What are the top 5 best-selling products?

requirementsPage.sampleText:
Business requirements:
- Monthly revenue trend must be tracked.
- Top 5 best-selling products must be shown.
- Sales share by region must be analyzed.
- Monthly change in customer count is important.
